  "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits each load-bearing claim against evidence, identifying unsupported claims and suggesting improvements.",

  "RX.1": "Uncertainties are clearly marked, such as questioning the accuracy of references and implementation details.",

  "RX.4": "No harmful content is introduced; instead, potential harms are identified and mitigated.",

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits each load-bearing claim against evidence, identifying unsupported claims and suggesting improvements.
rationale.R1.6: The critique provides detailed feedback on improving writing quality, indicating a careful copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainties are clearly marked, such as questioning the accuracy of references and implementation details.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the agreed scope without drifting, addressing all requested aspects.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content is introduced; instead, potential harms are identified and mitigated.
rationale.RX.5: While some changes are traced, not every edit is annotated with sources, falling short of the highest standard.
